notes: Core product category of Snap Appliance; Aberdeen cited NAS as winning combination with ATA for midline.
Inexpensive disk technology at core of Snap product line; Snap Server 4200/4500 use 4x ATA-100 disks. Precursor to SATA in enterprise.
Aberdeen taxonomy term; Snap explicitly covers all midline storage categories Aberdeen envisaged.
Proprietary operating system for workgroup Snap Server products; field-hardened for ease of use.
Linux-based OS for departmental and enterprise Snap Servers; added snapshots and Windows ADS support.
Entry-level RAID 5 available in Snap Server 4100 and higher; data protection configuration option.
Data protection option in Snap Server 2200 and higher.
Dual gigabit-Ethernet adapters in Snap Server 4200/4500 departmental products.
Windows file sharing protocol supported by Snap Servers.
Unix/Linux file sharing protocol supported by Snap Servers.
Automated scheduled client backup software bundled with every Snap Server; unlimited Windows client license.
World's best selling NAS server as of 2003; capable and portable file server at workgroup scale.
Enterprise-class; 1.44 TB to 3.0 TB across 12 disks in 3U rack; ADS and NIS security protocol support.
